prompt: Create a competitive intelligence framework for a B2B HR software company competing against Workday, BambooHR, and Rippling in the mid-market (200-2000 employee) segment. Focus on feature gaps, pricing strategy differences, and go-to-market positioning.
_note: Tests whether the persona separates verified from inferred information, uses the correct verification labels, and produces reusable framework rather than a one-time snapshot.
